calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Motion To Deposit Funds Into Court
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Patricia S. Lakner, Esq. of DAVIDOVITZ & BENNETT LLP 956-4800 for Intervenor OneBeacon Insurance Company of America and moving to deposit funds into Court
Miles B. Cooper, Esq. of THE VEEN FIRM, P.C. 673-4800 for Plaintiffs
Wendy L. Wilcox, Esq. of JAMPOL, ZIMET & WILCOX, LLP 213/689-8500 for defendants PANKOW and THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows -- INTERVENOR ONEBEACON INSURANCE COMPANY Motion To Deposit Funds Into Court -- granted with modifications:
1. Inererst shall accrue until funds are deposited with court.
2. Upon deposit of funds, Plaintif shall file a Notice of Partial Satisfaction of Judgment in the amount deposited.
3. Upon filing of the Notice of Partial Satisfaction of Judgment, the Clerk of the Court shall immediately release the deposited funds to Plaintiff.
4. Plaintiff is to prepare an order reflecting this tentative ruling and present it for signature at the hearing.
Order signed in open court. (301/JLW/DM) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.
